description: Arriving at the rendezvous, Skye and May find a Resistance contact who is wary of them due to Hydra’s broadcasts. Their position is compromised; Hydra arrives, leading to a firefight. May and Skye fend off attackers, with Daisy using her powers to turn a grenade on the Hydra team and the agent contacting the Playground for backup as the situation grows desperate.

transcript.line: Are you sure the Patriot's dead?
I saw the building collapse on him. I have the body-cam footage to prove it.
Hey! Hey. We are friends of the Resistance.
I know who you are. There's chatter all over the police band.
We weren't followed. We were careful.
